channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: 斯塔默称英国不会卷入“更广泛战争”
item.description: Comment from British prime minister comes as German government warns of danger of ‘never-ending’ conflict

item.title: 介绍Postgres终端界面客户端pgtui
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/mbljtb/introducing_pgtui_postgres_tui_client">Comments</a></p>

item.title: 以色列扩大在黎巴嫩南部地面行动
item.description: The Israeli army says it has begun limited targeted ground operations against Hezbollah in South Lebanon. It comes three weeks after the US and Israel began carrying out strikes in Iran, a war that ha

item.title: 法国公民因间谍罪在阿塞拜疆被判10年
item.description: Martin Ryan was accused of collecting secret information about Baku's military co-operation with Turkey and Pakistan.

item.title: 2026年卡斯蒂利亚-莱昂选举结果街道地图
item.description: Consulte aquí los ganadores y los resultados de las elecciones castellanoleonesas calle a calle. Siete de las nueve capitales han cambiado su voto mayoritario respecto a 2022. El PP se convierte en el

item.title: [未译] Future AI chips could be built on glass
item.description: Human-made glass is thousands of years old. But it’s now poised to find its way into the AI chips used in the world’s newest and largest data centers. This year, a South Korean company called Absolics

item.title: 日本启动史上最大规模战略石油储备释放
item.description: Crude oil prices have soared as the Strait of Hormuz, through which most Japan-bound oil passes, remains effectively closed.

item.title: 散户从私募信贷金矿撤资数十亿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 瑞银：奢侈品股遭遇多年来最悲观情绪
item.description: Investors have adopted the most pessimistic outlook on European luxury stocks in years as the war in the Middle East threatens to delay a long-expected rebound in demand, according to UBS analysts.

item.title: 亚德尼对逆势股票买入信号转持怀疑态度
item.description: The mood in the stock market by the end of last week was the type of stuff that contrarian investors dream about.

item.title: 伦交所启动美国高等级美元债券发行以再融资
item.description: London Stock Exchange Group Plc has kicked off the sale of US dollar bonds as it looks to refinance debt, adding to what is set to be a heavy day of issuance in the investment-grade debt market.

item.title: 斯塔默宣布5300万英镑援助应对取暖油成本
item.description: The money will be for "vulnerable" households who have faced a sharp rise in energy bills since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: 无醇啤酒与宠物美容成通胀新衡量指标
item.description: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.

item.title: 厄瓜多尔部署7.5万军警打击贩毒集团
item.description: Citizens of the most violent-wracked provinces have been warned the government is "at war" with the gangs.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标进展艰难
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊朗示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 德黑兰居民称伊朗正预防反体制抗议
item.description: Residents describe new security checkpoints around the capital, where they say people are stopped and searched.

item.title: 乌克兰在金融前线展开紧急斗争
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 巴西收获预期推动罗布斯塔咖啡跌至近七月低点
item.description: Robusta coffee steadied after falling to a seven-month low on expectations of record Brazilian output of high-end arabica beans, which could ease demand for the cheaper variety.

item.title: 英企雇24岁以下失业者获3000英镑补贴
item.description: It comes as ministers grapple with spiralling unemployment rates among young people.

item.title: 培育超越幼儿阶段的自主人工智能
item.description: Parents of young children face a lot of fears about developmental milestones, from infancy through adulthood. The number of months it takes a baby to learn to talk or walk is often used as a benchmark

item.title: 南非警方：吹哨人谋杀案嫌疑人为前精英军官
item.description: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

item.title: 英伟达发布会需惊喜唤醒沉睡股价
item.description: Nvidia Corp. executives will likely need to deliver a surprise at the chipmaker’s annual AI conference that begins Monday to spark a rally in the moribund stock.

item.title: 钢厂运营日耗130万英镑
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 吹哨人称TikTok与Meta为算法竞赛牺牲安全
item.description: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

item.title: 美国组织如何在英国推动新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: Nebius与Meta签270亿基建协议后股价涨14%
item.description: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion related to AI this year.

item.title: [未译] Banknotes, beavers and a very British backlash
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: 探究AI在某些游戏中表现不佳的原因
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.

item.title: 台湾从伊朗乌克兰汲取何种防空战略教训？
item.description: Lessons from the wars in Iran and Ukraine are pushing Taipei to rethink its air-defence strategy, with officials now warning that expensive missiles alone cannot stop large waves of rockets and drones
